headline: Nasdaq Props The Door For SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs
summary: Nasdaq, which is competing for the SpaceX listing, just made it easier for Elon Musk's company and other supersized IPOs to gain quick entry into the Nasdaq 100 index.

raw.headline: Nasdaq Props The Door For SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs
raw.summary: Nasdaq, which is competing for the SpaceX listing, just made it easier for Elon Musk's company and other supersized IPOs to gain quick entry into the Nasdaq 100 index.

headline: Crypto asset manager CoinShares to begin trading on Nasdaq through SPAC merger
summary: CoinShares is merging with Vine Hill Capital to form the holding company CoinShares PLC in a deal valuing the business at about $1.2 billion.

raw.headline: Crypto asset manager CoinShares to begin trading on Nasdaq through SPAC merger
raw.summary: CoinShares is merging with Vine Hill Capital to form the holding company CoinShares PLC in a deal valuing the business at about $1.2 billion.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Hegseth on the defensive
summary: Report suggests U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth looked to make a major defense investment in the lead up to the Iran war.

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Hegseth on the defensive

headline: A Look At Nasdaq (NDAQ) Valuation After Faster Nasdaq 100 Entry Rule For Large New Listings
summary: Nasdaq (NDAQ) is drawing fresh attention after approving changes to the Nasdaq 100 Index methodology, including a new fast entry rule that lets large newly public companies join within 15 trading days. See our latest analysis for Nasdaq. Against this backdrop of index rule changes and growing focus on digital assets, Nasdaq’s 1-year total shareholder return of 11.44% contrasts with a year-to-date share price return of negative 13.59%. This suggests that longer term holders have fared better...
